message:
audit: fcp-mesh signature-verification gaps closed; file MEDIUM replay bead (qvzvp)

Memory's "Architectural gaps" list (handle_summary, handle_symbol_ack,
handle_decode_status, RevocationPush) is fully closed by the Apr 19
swarm work (81f303c8 et al). All four handlers now require Ed25519
peer signatures before mutating state.

Filed flywheel_connectors-qvzvp [MEDIUM] for the residual finding:
SymbolAck and DecodeStatus signed transcripts include epoch_id but
no recipient NodeId or per-request nonce, exposing within-epoch
cross-recipient replay (cancels unrelated transfers; availability
impact). Requires protocol-level transcript change.

Other LOW notes (not patched in this pass):
- MeshGossip::handle_summary is pub and re-exported; defended only by
  doc comment plus the absence of external callers in-tree.
- register_peer_signing_key silently overwrites; trust-anchor
  contract should be louder in the docstring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
